---
title: "Chikv | Pathway analysis visualization | KEGG Maps"
author: "Giorgio Gonnella"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    theme: sandstone
params:
  analysis: "1"
  input_step: "06.P.compute_pathways"
  input_rds: "so_w_pathways.KEGG.rds"
  this_step: "06.V.pathways_results"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(message=F, warning=F, echo=F)
withr::with_dir(here::here(), { source("renv/activate.R") })

library(ggplot2)
library(clusterProfiler)
library(enrichplot)
library(rmdreportdeck)
reportdeck_setup()
knitr::opts_chunk$set(cache=F)

analysis_root <- here::here(paste0("analysis-", params$analysis, "/"))

input_step_dir <- paste0(analysis_root, "steps/", params$input_step, "/")
input_var_dir  <- paste0(input_step_dir, "results/vars/")
if (!dir.exists(input_var_dir)) {
  stop("Input variable directory does not exist: ", input_var_dir)
}

this_step_dir <- paste0(analysis_root, "steps/", params$this_step, "/")
if (!dir.exists(this_step_dir)) {
  stop("Current step directory does not exist: ", this_step_dir)
}

results_dir <- paste0(this_step_dir, "results/")
step_pfx    <- "V06-keggmaps"

helpers_dir <- here::here("helpers/")
source(paste0(helpers_dir, "pathway_analysis_viz_helpers.R"))
source(paste0(helpers_dir, "pathway_analysis_comp_helpers.R"))
```

# Goal

Draw KEGG pathway maps for ORA and GSEA results computed in the pathway analysis step.
Each significant pathway is shown as a collapsible section with an embedded PDF map
and a download link, organised by cell type and condition pair.

```{r load_input_data}
so <- readRDS(file = paste0(input_var_dir, params$input_rds))
celltypes    <- c(unique(as.character(so$celltype)), "Total")
cond_pairs   <- c("A", "M6", "NC", "C")
cond_pairs_lbl <- c("A.C_vs_NC", "6M.C_vs_NC", "NC.A_vs_6M", "C.A_vs_6M")
names(cond_pairs_lbl) <- cond_pairs
```

```{r strsanitize}
strsanitize <- function(s) {
  gsub(" ", "_", gsub("[^[:alnum:]]", "_", s))
}
```

```{r results, results='asis', echo=F}
make_section_block_pfx <- function(...) {
  sanitize_name(paste(..., collapse = "-"))
}

pathway_name_from_file <- function(f) {
  # filename pattern: hsa04612.KEGG.Antigen_processing_and_presentation.pdf
  stem <- tools::file_path_sans_ext(basename(f))
  id   <- sub("\\.KEGG\\..*$", "", stem)
  desc <- gsub("_", " ", sub("^[^.]+\\.KEGG\\.", "", stem))
  list(id = id, desc = desc)
}

append_map_item <- function(items, f, block_pfx) {
  pw    <- pathway_name_from_file(f)
  uri   <- base64enc::dataURI(file = f, mime = "application/pdf")
  items[[length(items) + 1L]] <- report_item_panel(
    title    = paste0(pw$id, " \u2014 ", pw$desc),
    id       = block_pfx,
    asset_bar = report_asset_bar(
      "Downloads",
      report_download_link("Download PDF", basename(f), uri)
    ),
    htmltools::tags$object(
      data  = uri,
      type  = "application/pdf",
      style = "width:100%; height:600px;",
      htmltools::tags$p(
        "PDF preview not available. ",
        htmltools::tags$a("Download PDF", href = uri, download = basename(f))
      )
    )
  )
  items
}

draw_and_collect <- function(kegg_results, l2fc, dirname) {
  dir.create(dirname, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
  before <- list.files(dirname, full.names = TRUE)
  kegg_draw_pathways(kegg_results, l2fc, dirname)
  setdiff(list.files(dirname, full.names = TRUE), before)
}

emit_section <- function(cell_items, no_results_cts) {
  if (length(cell_items) > 0L) {
    cat(as.character(report_loop_section(
      cell_items,
      open_first = FALSE,
      max_open   = 999L,
      level      = 2L
    )))
    cat("\n")
  }
  if (length(no_results_cts) > 0L) {
    cat("\n\n## Cell types with no significant results\n\n")
    cat(paste0("- ", no_results_cts, collapse = "\n"), "\n\n")
  }
}

for (pair_idx in seq_along(cond_pairs)) {
  pair     <- cond_pairs[[pair_idx]]
  pair_lbl <- cond_pairs_lbl[[pair]]

  # ── ORA maps ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  cat(paste0("\n# ", pair_lbl, " ORA\n\n"))
  cell_items     <- list()
  no_results_cts <- character(0)

  for (ct_idx in seq_along(celltypes)) {
    ct  <- celltypes[[ct_idx]]
    cts <- strsanitize(ct)
    ct_block_pfx <- make_section_block_pfx(step_pfx, pair_idx, "ORA", ct_idx, cts)
    map_items <- list()

    if (!is.null(so@misc$de[[pair]]$pval_filt[[ct]]) &&
        nrow(so@misc$de[[pair]]$pval_filt[[ct]]) > 0) {
      kegg_results <- so@misc$ora$KEGG[[pair]][[ct]]
      if (!is.null(kegg_results) && nrow(kegg_results) > 0) {
        l2fc <- so@misc$de[[pair]]$pval_filt[[ct]]$avg_log2FC
        names(l2fc) <- rownames(so@misc$de[[pair]]$pval_filt[[ct]])
        dirname  <- paste0(results_dir, pair_lbl, "/KEGG/ORA/", cts, "/maps/")
        new_files <- draw_and_collect(kegg_results, l2fc, dirname)
        for (f_idx in seq_along(new_files)) {
          map_items <- append_map_item(
            map_items, new_files[[f_idx]],
            make_section_block_pfx(ct_block_pfx, f_idx)
          )
        }
      }
    }

    if (length(map_items) > 0L) {
      cell_items[[length(cell_items) + 1L]] <- report_item_panel(
        title = ct,
        id    = ct_block_pfx,
        report_loop_section(map_items, open_first = FALSE, max_open = 1L, level = 3L)
      )
    } else {
      no_results_cts <- c(no_results_cts, ct)
    }
  }
  emit_section(cell_items, no_results_cts)

  # ── GSEA maps ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  cat(paste0("\n# ", pair_lbl, " GSEA\n\n"))
  cell_items     <- list()
  no_results_cts <- character(0)

  for (ct_idx in seq_along(celltypes)) {
    ct  <- celltypes[[ct_idx]]
    cts <- strsanitize(ct)
    ct_block_pfx <- make_section_block_pfx(step_pfx, pair_idx, "GSEA", ct_idx, cts)
    map_items <- list()

    kegg_results <- so@misc$gsea$KEGG[[pair]][[ct]]
    if (!is.null(kegg_results) && nrow(kegg_results) > 0) {
      l2fc <- so@misc$de[[pair]]$all[[ct]]$avg_log2FC
      names(l2fc) <- rownames(so@misc$de[[pair]]$all[[ct]])
      dirname   <- paste0(results_dir, pair_lbl, "/KEGG/GSEA/", cts, "/maps/")
      new_files <- draw_and_collect(kegg_results, l2fc, dirname)
      for (f_idx in seq_along(new_files)) {
        map_items <- append_map_item(
          map_items, new_files[[f_idx]],
          make_section_block_pfx(ct_block_pfx, f_idx)
        )
      }
    }

    if (length(map_items) > 0L) {
      cell_items[[length(cell_items) + 1L]] <- report_item_panel(
        title = ct,
        id    = ct_block_pfx,
        report_loop_section(map_items, open_first = FALSE, max_open = 1L, level = 3L)
      )
    } else {
      no_results_cts <- c(no_results_cts, ct)
    }
  }
  emit_section(cell_items, no_results_cts)
}
```

# Session info

```{r}
sessionInfo()
```
